summary: Created multi-agent board for Devpilot P8 server-agent task-pull split.

Architect accepted API/CLI/docs boundaries and diagrams; reviewer should check finish/ack metadata drift and default-off gates.

Dispatched read-only Module Owner explorer Kierkegaard to propose the next exact task-pull CLI executor todo.

Aggregated API and CLI verification evidence; focused checks passed with logs under /tmp/codex-tool-runs/svton/.

Completed S002 merge-readiness closure; focused API/CLI verification passed, scoped review passed with no findings, and docs/board evidence was synced.
Started read-only gap mapping for documented Devpilot deliverable runtime gaps.
Completed source-backed gap mapping; narrowed S004/S005 and queued later multi-instance and remote-orphan candidates.
Completed foreground real-agent runtime operability slice; task-pull run summaries now include non-sensitive runtimeProfile metadata and focused CLI verification passed.
Started terminal task-pull runtime verification-first slice as the only active write slice.

Completed terminal runtime proof; local CLI once runner now has a real command-step proof across claim, ack/progress, and finish payload, with focused CLI/API verification passed and no production code change required.
Started final deliverability E2E and permission gate after S002-S005 completion.

Completed deliverability gate checks with all executed API/CLI/Web verification passing, but judged not deliverable yet because S003 source-backed S007/S008 backlog remains implementable and not external.

Completed task-pull multi-instance coordination proof; focused API specs now cover claim fairness, lost-race handling, runner lock ownership, fallback owners, and supervisor coordination signals.

Completed production remote-orphan governance proof; focused API specs now cover cleanup-disabled blockers, cleanup failure visibility, truncated stale scans, and existing stale remote cleanup persistence.

Completed post-S008 final deliverability gate; API/CLI runtime gates passed, prerequisite build/type-check logs are green, S003 backlog is closed, and Devpilot is judged deliverable with documented residual deployment/operator risks.
Marked the Devpilot deliverable-closure goal completed: .agent-board/board.json is deliverable, long-goal board is completed, and S009 is the final deliverability judgment.

Generated the G004 release evidence index with verified scope and forbidden production claims.

Started production MVP final gate as the only active write slice.
Completed final local gate checks and judged Devpilot production-like ready with external signoff required.

Stopped G004 because all local and Docker-backed authorized checks are complete; production MVP readiness now requires real provider/resource, production backup/rollback, and live restore approvals/evidence.
